title: phlox subulata subsp. eusubulata
intro: Phlox subulata subsp. eusubulata, also known as Creeping Phlox, is a low-growing, spreading evergreen perennial plant native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Creeping Phlox include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting better sleep, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Creeping Phlox can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation.
